ddls:
CREATE TABLE "glass_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glass sample */,
  "ri" REAL /* Refractive index (RI) of the glass sample */,
  "na" REAL /* Percentage of Sodium (Na) in the glass sample */,
  "mg" REAL /* Percentage of Magnesium (Mg) in the glass sample */,
  "al" REAL /* Percentage of Aluminum (Al) in the glass sample */,
  "si" REAL /* Percentage of Silicon (Si) in the glass sample */,
  "k" REAL /* Percentage of Potassium (K) in the glass sample */,
  "ca" REAL /* Percentage of Calcium (Ca) in the glass sample */,
  "ba" REAL /* Percentage of Barium (Ba) in the glass sample */,
  "fe" REAL /* Percentage of Iron (Fe) in the glass sample */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass type to which the sample belongs */,
  "sample_batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch from which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sample */,
  "sample_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sample */,
  "quality_control_passed" INTEGER /* Whether the sample has passed quality control checks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glass_samples_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES glass_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glass_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of glass */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the glass type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the glass type */,
  "glass_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the glass type */,
  "glass_type_properties" TEXT /* Additional properties or characteristics of the glass type */,
  "glass_type_usage" TEXT /* Common uses or applications of the glass type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the glass sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the glass sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the glass sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "sample_temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the sample was collected */,
  "sample_humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_metadata_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the glass sample */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., spectroscopy, chemical test) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_operator" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES glass_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the permission applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "permission_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the permission */,
  "permission_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
